query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS upload_text (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  intake_id INT NOT NULL,
  upload_id INT NOT NULL,
  file_name VARCHAR(500),
  extracted_text LONGTEXT,
  word_count INT DEFAULT 0,
  status VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'pending',
  error_message TEXT,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2QmWxs7iH8DQva8.5d87819da4f6 --database J2wS2ZoP78AcJaejkgQxeA --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS upload_text (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  intake_id INT NOT NULL,
  upload_id INT NOT NULL,
  file_name VARCHAR(500),
  extracted_text LONGTEXT,
  word_count INT DEFAULT 0,
  status VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'pending',
  error_message TEXT,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
